description_long: This is a medium-sized, bulbous vase with a wide, flared rim and a narrow, flat base. The surface is finished in a warm, ochre-brown color and features a distinct honeycomb-like geometric pattern that covers the entire body. A prominent vertical crack runs down one side, suggesting age or damage, while the rest of the surface appears intact. The vase has a matte, slightly rough texture, giving it a rustic and handcrafted appearance. The interior is likely hollow, suitable for holding flowers or decorative items. Its overall form and finish make it suitable for display in outdoor or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A medium, ochre-brown vase with a honeycomb pattern, flared rim, and visible crack, featuring a rustic matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the honeycomb pattern and a prominent vertical crack on the body.
description_view_1: Side view displays the continuous honeycomb pattern with no visible cracks.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, with uninterrupted honeycomb texture.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the honeycomb pattern without any cracks or damage.
